headline.purpose: Empty states, readiness summaries, and major panels.

title.purpose: Ticket panel headings and compact detail titles.

body.purpose: Descriptions, helper copy, cards, lists, and side-panel prose.

label.purpose: Labels, IDs, paths, commands, counters, status labels, and model names.

shadows.name: signal-glow
shadows.purpose: Hover and focus emphasis for interactive controls.

motion.name: state-fast
motion.purpose: Ticket hover, in-card action, and quick state transitions.

motion.name: control-standard
motion.purpose: Buttons, tabs, hover, and focus transitions.

motion.name: onboarding-rise
motion.purpose: First-run onboarding entrance only, disabled under prefers-reduced-motion.

breakpoints.name: desktop-collapse
breakpoints.purpose: Board and dashboard grids reduce columns.

breakpoints.name: tablet
breakpoints.purpose: Sidebar becomes top rail; board stacks to one column.

breakpoints.name: phone
breakpoints.purpose: Ticket panel becomes full-screen; controls increase tap size.

rules: The Signal Rarity Rule: cyan is for selection, focus, running state, and actionable affordances.
The State Truth Rule: mint, red, and amber must map to actual product state.
The Operational Mono Rule: monospace facts users compare or copy.
The Glow Means State Rule: glow is allowed for hover, focus, active, running, armed, and drag states.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Compact cyan or mint action used for reviewed, meaningful operations.
components.css: .primary-btn { min-height: 38px; border: 1px solid rgba(23, 241, 255, 0.46); border-radius: 8px; background: rgba(76, 201, 255, 0.13); color: #17f1ff; font: inherit; font-size: 13px; font-weight: 700; padding: 8px 14px; transition: border-color 0.15s, color 0.15s, box-shadow 0.15s, background 0.15s; } .primary-btn:hover { background: rgba(23, 241, 255, 0.18); border-color: #17f1ff; color: #e7f7ff; box-shadow: 0 0 22px rgba(23, 241, 255, 0.18); }

components.name: Ghost Button
components.description: Default chrome action for refresh, import, copy, and non-destructive controls.
components.css: .ghost-btn { padding: 8px 14px; border-radius: 8px; border: 1px solid rgba(72, 184, 255, 0.18); background: rgba(9, 22, 40, 0.76); color: #91b8ce; font-size: 13px; text-transform: uppercase; transition: border-color 0.15s, color 0.15s, box-shadow 0.15s, background 0.15s; } .ghost-btn:hover { background: rgba(12, 28, 52, 0.72); border-color: rgba(91, 207, 255, 0.42); color: #e7f7ff; box-shadow: 0 0 22px rgba(23, 241, 255, 0.18); }

components.name: Ticket Card
components.description: The signature work unit for ticket status, metadata, and review entry.
components.html:
HM-12P1

Review launch preview copy

workspace
components.css: .card { background: linear-gradient(180deg, rgba(17, 39, 69, 0.92), rgba(7, 18, 34, 0.9)); border: 1px solid rgba(72, 184, 255, 0.18); border-radius: 8px; padding: 12px 13px; box-shadow: 0 0 0 1px rgba(76, 201, 255, 0.08), 0 16px 40px rgba(0,0,0,0.38); transition: border-color 0.12s, transform 0.05s, box-shadow 0.12s, background 0.12s; } .card:hover { border-color: rgba(91, 207, 255, 0.42); box-shadow: 0 0 0 1px rgba(23,241,255,0.2), 0 14px 38px rgba(0,0,0,0.45), 0 0 24px rgba(23,241,255,0.12); }

components.name: Panel Input
components.description: Dark control field for tickets, project config, prompts, and command previews.
components.css: .panel-input { width: 100%; border: 1px solid rgba(91, 207, 255, 0.42); background: rgba(7, 21, 39, 0.84); color: #e7f7ff; font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', Roboto, Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; line-height: 1.45; padding: 9px 12px; border-radius: 8px; box-shadow: inset 0 0 18px rgba(76, 201, 255, 0.06); } .panel-input:focus { outline: none; border-color: #17f1ff; box-shadow: 0 0 0 1px rgba(23, 241, 255, 0.3), 0 0 22px rgba(23, 241, 255, 0.18); }

components.name: Status Chip
components.description: Tiny state label for priority, readiness, engine, role, and execution state.
components.css: .badge-ready { font-size: 10px; font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: 0.04em; color: #2fffd0; background: rgba(47, 255, 208, 0.12); border: 1px solid rgba(47, 255, 208, 0.22); padding: 2px 7px; border-radius: 6px; }

components.name: Side Panel
components.description: Desktop review drawer that becomes a full-screen phone panel.
components.css: .panel { position: fixed; top: 0; right: 0; bottom: 0; width: min(520px, 92vw); background: rgba(8, 19, 36, 0.82); border-left: 1px solid rgba(91, 207, 255, 0.42); box-shadow: -20px 0 60px rgba(0,0,0,0.48), -1px 0 24px rgba(23,241,255,0.14); overflow-y: auto; padding: 28px 28px 48px; } @media (max-width: 640px) { .panel { width: 100vw; border-left: none; padding: 24px 18px 40px; } }
